## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Outreach's content strategy, performance metrics, and team updates.](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New AI agent pages live \~2 weeks ago; visibility in LLM responses still low but expected to improve](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Looker dashboard integrating GA4 and GSC data now available, showing LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Jo transitioning to new team; new managing editor to join next week with full knowledge transfer](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Approvals

  - [13 assignments left in "considering" status; most to be approved](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Last week's batch reviewed, to be staged this week](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Featured images replaced with Outreach-created designs; designer experimenting to match GrowthX style](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Flexible staging schedule, typically within 1-2 days after review](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### Scrunch Data Analysis

  - [50 new prompts added based on customer questions from sales calls](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Low visibility for Outreach in responses, but competitors also not dominating](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Some queries (e.g., AI sales agents) show competitors like SalesLoft mentioned 86% of the time](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Opportunity identified for future blogs on topics with low mention rates](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)

### Improving AI Agent Visibility

  - [Recent launch of AI agent pages (2 weeks ago) contributes to low visibility](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Strategy: Mention AI agents throughout site, in refreshes, new content, PR, and third-party sites](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Recommendation to update G2 profiles and review websites to boost AI agent prominence](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)

### Looker Dashboard Overview

  - [Integrates GA4 and GSC data, complementing Scrunch insights](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Key metrics: sessions vs. engaged sessions, referral sources, search ranking distribution](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Non-branded report showing clicks and impressions from GSC](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Conversion events tracking, with focus on demo requests and qualified bot interactions](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Cluster performance tracking for GrowthX-produced content](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic breakdown (ChatGPT leading, followed by Perplexity and Gemini)](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Team Update

  - [Jo moving to a different team due to internal reshuffling](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [New managing editor to join next week with full knowledge transfer](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Aida assures high standards will be maintained with experienced new editor](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Hadassah to approve remaining content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Team to implement AI agent mentions across various channels (website, PR, third-party sites)](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Jo to check integration of "GA\_event" for qualified bot tracking in Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
  - [Aida to send Scrunch data screenshots via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [New managing editor to be introduced and onboarded next week](https://fathom.video/share/zasvSuPih2Z6LeNp4yheUW8r9aC5jGzP?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
